description: Regression gates for `python -m evals.runner --check`. Floors are set to the measured 2026-06-11 baseline ('do not regress'), NOT to the aspirational target. Phase 0 (reranker + gate, judge full-text fix, citation ordering fix) is merged but NOT yet re-baselined live - keep floors until the Phase 1 before/after runs land (see evals/FINDINGS.md 'Phase 1 runbook'), then raise no_false_archive_grounding_rate to 100 and mean_faithfulness toward 0.7.
